name: Chinese Chicken Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 8 Oz Vermicelli or Angel Hair Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soy sauce, water, brown sugar, sesame oil, vinegar, cornstarch, garlic, ginger and both peppers in a dish.
2. Cut chicken into 1/2-inch strips; add to marinade. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Bring salted water to boiling for cooking pasta according to package directions.
4. Remove the dish from the refrigerator.
5. Saute until the chicken is tender and the sauce has thickened. Stir in bell pepper, cabbage, celery, and green onions. Cook until vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Add cooked pasta to the boiling water and cook according to package directions. Drain.
7. Spoon the chicken mixture over the top of the pasta. Makes 4 servings.
